raw_responses.query: MemPalace method of loci LLM agent memory architecture spatial criticism

results.title: Spatial Metaphors for LLM Memory: A Critical Analysis of the MemPalace Architecture
results.snippet: MemPalace applies method of loci (memory palace) spatial metaphor to organize LLM long-term memory; hierarchical Wings (domains) -> Rooms (topics) -> Drawers (chunks). Performance attributable to verbatim storage + ChromaDB embedding model rather than spatial organizational metaphor per se. Spatial memory metaphors as organizing principle for AI memory systems.
